title: Dawn of Discovery - Venice
notes: Black screen except for in-game cursor style

title: Dawn of Discovery: Venice
notes: The game reports it couldn't initialize DirectX. Tested with PROTON_NO_D3D11 and PROTON_USE_WINED3D11 variables.

title: Dawn of Discovery: Venice
notes: Must install on Linux native (BTRFS/ext4/etc...), use winetricks listed in wine app db target to pfx directory in compatdata, must edit engine.ini in steamapps/common for dx9, text is still jagged

Everything works fine after just a small known workaround: add
<DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion>
to the Engine.ini file. Automatic install and workaround using Lutris is possible.
